title: Limitation of Font Size in Monday Doc Tables
excerpt:
I noticed that while we can successfully adjust the font size for regular paragraph text in format tool bar in monday.doc , but this feature does not seem to apply to any text located inside a table. 
Steps to reproduce …

posts.author: zacharylee0630 (zacharylee0630)
posts.cookedHtml:
I noticed that while we can successfully adjust the font size for regular paragraph text in format tool bar in monday.doc , but this feature does not seem to apply to any text located inside a table.

Steps to reproduce the issue:

  1. Create a new Monday Doc.
  2. Insert a table.
  3. Type text into any cell within the table.
  4. Highlight the text and attempt to change the font size using the toolbar.(small/regular/large)
  5. Result: The font size of the text inside the table does not change.

Our team uses tables extensively to present summary data and reports to our clients. Being able to increase the font size for headers or key figures is crucial for readability and creating a clear visual hierarchy in our documents. Is it possible to have the text size adjustment inside the table?

posts.author: cszaroz (Casey Szaroz)
posts.cookedHtml: I found the same thing. The default text in a table of any size is so small. The only way I have been able to increase the size is to change the text in each cell (one by one) to a header.
